summary: Tested new Upstox broker integration endpoints and updated frontend. All 38 backend tests pass (19 original + 19 new Upstox tests). Frontend renders all components correctly with LIVE TRADING badge, Upstox:Disconnected badge, and NOT CONNECTED warning banner. Fixed 1 minor HTML validation issue.

tag caused React hydration warning

critical_code_review_comments: All Upstox endpoints properly handle disconnected state with appropriate error messages
Combined-status endpoint correctly returns mode=LIVE with upstox_connected=false
OAuth flow UI is complete with Login button, auth code input, and Connect button
Trade History tab renders correctly with empty state message

success_rate.backend: 100% (38/38 tests passed - 19 original + 19 new Upstox tests)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all components render, LIVE mode UI working, Settings Broker tab complete)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Upstox integration endpoints all tested and working in disconnected state. When Upstox is actually connected, additional tests should verify: real market data fetching, portfolio retrieval, order placement. MOCKED: Upstox connection (no real token), Trading engine (paper), Market indices (simulated when not connected to Upstox).

tested_features.upstox_market_data: PASS - Returns error 'Not logged in to Upstox' with data=null
tested_features.upstox_orders: PASS - Returns error 'Not logged in' with orders=[]
tested_features.combined_status: PASS - Returns mode=LIVE, upstox_connected=false, market_data=null, portfolio=null, orders=[]
tested_features.existing_health: PASS - All previous endpoints still working
tested_features.frontend_live_badge: PASS - Shows 'LIVE TRADING' badge in header
tested_features.frontend_warning_banner: PASS - Shows 'LIVE MODE - NOT CONNECTED' banner
tested_features.frontend_trade_history_tab: PASS - Tab exists and shows empty state message
tested_features.settings_broker_tab: PASS - Shows Upstox Connection status, API fields, OAuth flow UI
tested_features.all_components: PASS - MarketTicker, RiskPanel, NewsFeed, TradesList, SignalsList, AutoTradingSettings, PositionCalculator, TradeHistory, SettingsPanel render without errors
